name: Service of Process Calculator

F3.name: Disqualification Motion (MCR 2.003)
F3.timing_rule: MCR 2.119(C)(1) — 9 days before hearing by mail (14 days personal)

certified_mail.proof: Return receipt (green card) = proof of service

first_class_mail.proof: Affidavit of mailing (you sign stating you mailed it)

F6.name: JTC Complaint
F6.service_rule: JTC rules — complaint sent to JTC, they handle investigation
F6.timing_rule: No specific timing — file at any time
F6.note: JTC complaints are CONFIDENTIAL. Do NOT serve Emily or judge directly.

F10.name: COA Emergency Motion
F10.service_rule: MCR 7.210 — serve all parties to lower court proceeding
F10.timing_rule: Emergency — serve simultaneously with filing or ASAP after

email_if_consented.note: Only if opposing party consented to email service

F10.note: Emergency motion — serve ASAP. Include IFP application if applicable.

certificate_of_service_template.body: I, Andrew James Pigors, hereby certify that on [DATE], I served a true copy of the foregoing [DOCUMENT TITLE] upon the following parties by [METHOD]:
certificate_of_service_template.signature:
Andrew James Pigors, Plaintiff, Pro Se
1977 Whitehall Road, Lot 17
North Muskegon, MI 49445
(231) 903-5690

methods_text.certified_mail: United States Postal Service, certified mail, return receipt requested
methods_text.first_class: United States Postal Service, first class mail, postage prepaid

total_service_cost: $31.00 (certified mail for all filings) or $2.92 (first class)
usps_tips: Keep ALL receipts — they're proof of service
Use certified mail with return receipt (green card) for strongest proof
Save tracking numbers — enter them on USPS.com for delivery confirmation
Mail from USPS counter (not mailbox) — get receipt with date stamp
If certified mail returned unclaimed — that's STILL valid service in many cases

emily_watson.name: Emily A. Watson
emily_watson.method: Certified mail, return receipt requested (or personal service)

jennifer_barnes.name: Jennifer Barnes (P55406)
jennifer_barnes.address: Barnes Law Firm PLLC, 880 Jefferson St Ste B, Muskegon, MI 49440
jennifer_barnes.method: Only if still attorney of record — verify withdrawal order
jennifer_barnes.note: WITHDREW — may not need service. Check court docket.

pamela_rusco.name: Pamela Rusco
pamela_rusco.method: First class mail or hand delivery to FOC office
